---
title: "AI Agents in Economics and Business Research"
subtitle: "Day 2 - Advanced Practice"
author: "Tinbergen Institute"
format:
  revealjs:
    footer: "Tinbergen Institute | Day 2"
---

## {.center}

::: {.r-fit-text}
From useful prototypes to robust systems.
:::

## Day 2 structure

- Six blocks, 60 minutes each
- 20 lecture, 30 hands-on, 10 debrief
- Reliability evidence in every block

## Storyline

- Recap day-1 artifacts quickly
- Build orchestration and pipelines
- End with adoption and resilience

## Blocks 1-3 (morning)

- B1 Recap + reliability mindset
- B2 Agent systems and orchestration I
- B3 Orchestration II with failures (E5)

## Blocks 4-6 (afternoon)

- B4 Research pipeline design I
- B5 Research pipeline design II (E6)
- B6 Evaluation, economics, sustainability (E7/E8)

## Media placeholders (day opener)

- [PLACEHOLDER] `slides/assets/media/day2/diagrams/d2_b2_single_vs_multi_agent_v01.png`
- [PLACEHOLDER] `slides/assets/media/day2/diagrams/d2_b3_retry_timeout_fallback_v01.png`
- [PLACEHOLDER] `slides/assets/media/day2/videos/d2_b3_resilience_demo_v01.mp4`

## Task {.center background-color="black"}

**Exercise flow for Day 2**

- E5 architecture with failure handling
- E6 pilot stimuli + protocol note
- E7 scoring + memo, E8 resilience plan

*Groups of 3. Artifacts submitted per block.*

## Resource anchors in this deck

- Systems: R004, R018, R023, R035
- Research pipeline: R009/R010, R011, R022, R038, R044/R045
- Evaluation and adoption: R017, R040, R043/R046, R055

## Block deck links

- `/slides/blocks/day2/day2_b1_recap_reliability.html`
- `/slides/blocks/day2/day2_b2_orchestration_i.html`
- `/slides/blocks/day2/day2_b3_orchestration_ii.html`

## Block deck links (cont.)

- `/slides/blocks/day2/day2_b4_pipeline_i.html`
- `/slides/blocks/day2/day2_b5_pipeline_ii.html`
- `/slides/blocks/day2/day2_b6_evaluation_adoption_resilience.html`

## Close

- Measure before deciding at scale
- Keep humans responsible for decisions
